title: elleanthus graminifolius
intro: Elleanthus graminifolius, also known as Elleanthus grass-leaved, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. It is primarily found in tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Elleanthus graminifolius include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections and promote overall well-being.
